name: Sacre-Coeur Minerals Ltd.
description: Sacre-Coeur Minerals, Ltd. is a Canadian-based resource company primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in South America. The company focuses on the potential mining of gold, base metals, and diamonds, with significant exploration activities historically centered on its properties in Guyana. As a publicly traded entity on the TSX Venture Exchange, it seeks to identify and advance high-potential mineral projects to create value for shareholders through systematic exploration and development programs in prospective geological regions.
